comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@shyukri TYVM for the update to the install.md.  The changes LGTM, however you need to sign your commit.  Can you please do "git commit --amend -s" and push again?
@shyukri Any chance you could get it packaged by default in OpenSuse?
@rhatdan i can give it a try :)

:pushpin: Commit 7d8267f has been approved by `rhatdan`
